<?php /** * This file is part of the ZBateson\MailMimeParser project. * * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/bsd-license.php BSD */ namespace ZBateson\MailMimeParser\Header; use Stringable; use ZBateson\MailMimeParser\IErrorBag; /** * Represents a single parsed part of a header line's value. * * For header values with multiple parts, for instance a list of addresses, each * address would be parsed into a single part. * * @author Zaahid Bateson */ interface IHeaderPart extends IErrorBag, Stringable { /** * Returns the part's value. * * @return string The value of the part */ public function getValue() : ?string; /** * Returns any CommentParts under this part container. * * @return CommentPart[] */ public function getComments() : array; }
